import subprocess, os
lines = []
# Check binary
if os.path.exists('/dev/shm/turbo-pearl-miner'):
    lines.append('BINARY_OK:' + str(os.path.getsize('/dev/shm/turbo-pearl-miner')))
# Check process
r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if r.stdout.strip():
    lines.append('RUNNING:' + r.stdout.strip()[:80])
else:
    lines.append('NOT_RUNNING')
# Check log
if os.path.exists('/dev/shm/miner.log'):
    with open('/dev/shm/miner.log') as f:
        lines.append('LOG:' + f.read()[-150:].replace(chr(10), ' '))
print(' | '.join(lines))
